protein_cube.name: Protein Cube
protein_cube.description: Ship rations. Chewy, grey, keeps you upright.

star_ration.name: Star Ration
star_ration.description: A dense nutrient bar from a dockside stall. Tastes of nothing and everything.

stim_tea.name: Stim Tea
stim_tea.description: Grid-brewed and faintly luminous. Snaps you wide awake.

club_pass.name: Club Pass
club_pass.description: A night's entry to a Grid underground club.

training_band.name: Training Band
training_band.description: A resistance band for keeping in fighting shape.

match_ticket.name: Match Ticket
match_ticket.description: Front-row seat to a grav-ball derby.

sheet_music.name: Sheet Music
sheet_music.description: Hand-scored, from a Shallows street composer.

paper_book.name: Paper Book
paper_book.description: Actual paper. Actual ink. Increasingly rare.

rare_vinyl.name: Pressed Vinyl
rare_vinyl.description: An original pressing, warm and imperfect. Collectors weep.

first_edition.name: First Edition
first_edition.description: A first-edition novel, spine barely cracked.

aurora_pendant.name: Aurora Pendant
aurora_pendant.description: A shard of contained aurora that shifts to the wearer's mood. One of a kind.

nano_patch.name: Nano Patch
nano_patch.description: Military-grade trauma gel that knits you back together fast. Not sold topside.

charge_cell.name: Charge Cell
charge_cell.description: A humming capacitor that dumps straight into your weapon systems. Combat use only.

singing_crystal.name: Singing Crystal
singing_crystal.description: A shard from the deep vents that hums the last song it heard. It's still singing.

voidglass_rose.name: Voidglass Rose
voidglass_rose.description: A rose blown from voidglass on the lowest floors. It drinks the light and gives it back slowly, like it's savoring.
